summary: Reframed the opening to mark the chapter as the next morning after Chapter 2 and to avoid repeating Chapter 4's time-and-drive opening scaffold, while preserving the chapter's events, tone, and handoff into the next chapter.
edits: Added an explicit next-morning cue at the opening to clarify the boundary from Chapter 2.
Rebuilt the first paragraph around Beni waiting in the car instead of arriving, giving Chapter 3 a distinct opening shape from Chapter 4.
Kept the closing transition into Nina's midday call and departure sequence intact because it already feeds Chapter 4 cleanly.
